'''Gurks''' were hairy [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]. Despite their large size and their worrisome appearance, they were very peaceful animals. They ate primarily nuts, berries, and fruit.<ref name="SWG:G" /> These creatures were known for their loud yell.<ref name="TRoD" /> The inhabitants of Lok used to capture Gurks and train them for domestic use.<ref name="SWG:G" /> The hide of the "Gurk [[King/Legends|king]]" was said to be very useful in the construction of [[Armor/Legends|armor]], especially [[Reinforced Insulated Sheath armor]].<ref name="SWG:P4">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other}}Publish 4</ref>

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Sulfur Lake Pirates]] trained a large gurk named the [[Bridge Troll]] to guard their [[Sulfur Lake Pirate Hideout|hideout]] on Lok. The creature was later killed by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] working for [[Mako Ghast]] of the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]].<ref name="SWG:KtBT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Kill the Bridge Troll|Lok}}</ref>
